hero.title: Join the
hero.subtitle: Become a partner in Parivartan and help transform waste management through AI-powered solutions. Connect communities, reduce environmental impact, and earn rewards.

features.title: Why Partner With Us?
features.subtitle: Our AI-powered platform makes waste management efficient, transparent, and rewarding.
features.aiDesc: Advanced AI automatically identifies and classifies waste types with high accuracy.
features.rewardsDesc: Get compensated for every successful waste pickup and contribute to environmental goals.
features.trackDesc: Monitor your environmental contribution with detailed analytics and reports.

howItWorks.title: How Parivartan Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Our AI-powered platform streamlines waste management through intelligent automation and community collaboration.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Community members or partners identify and report waste through our mobile app or web platform.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Advanced AI analyzes photos to automatically classify waste type, quantity, and determine optimal processing method.
howItWorks.step3Desc: System intelligently assigns the most suitable waste management partner based on location, expertise, and availability.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Partners collect the waste and process it according to AI recommendations - recycling, composting, or safe disposal.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Partners earn rewards while tracking environmental impact through comprehensive analytics and performance dashboards.
howItWorks.poweredByAISubtitle: Our machine learning models continuously improve accuracy and efficiency
howItWorks.realtimeDesc: Instant waste analysis and partner matching

wasteGallery.title: Waste We Handle
wasteGallery.subtitle: Our AI system can identify and classify various types of waste for efficient processing.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions about partnering with us? Get in touch and we'll be happy to help.
contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorMessage: Failed to send message. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Transforming waste management for a sustainable future

learnMore.title: Our Mission
learnMore.subtitle: Our Journey Towards a Cleaner India 🌱
learnMore.motto: Turning waste into impact, one step at a time.
learnMore.story1: We observed a major waste management problem in our city, where large amounts of waste are generated daily but not properly recycled or segregated.
learnMore.story2: Through further research across cities like Jaipur and others, we discovered that this is not just a local issue but a nationwide concern.
learnMore.story3: In India, more than 60 million tons of waste is generated every year, and nearly 60% of it can be recycled. However, due to lack of awareness, accessibility, and proper systems, much of this recyclable waste goes unused. This inspired us to build Parivartan.
learnMore.goal3: Build a cleaner and greener India
learnMore.multiLangDesc: Use Parivartan in your own language — Hindi, Tamil, Bengali & more
learnMore.ctaSubtitle: Join Parivartan and be part of the change India needs.
